description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.15-slim Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define three stages (build, lint, deploy) and a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores node_modules/ and includes untracked files. In the build stage add a build job that runs a before_script to wget the Hugo 0.53 extended .deb to /tmp, installs it with dpkg -i, runs npm install, then executes npm run build, and publishes the public directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a production_deploy job that depends on build, runs only for tags, installs netlify-cli globally, and runs netlify deploy --dir=./public --prod. Also add a staging_deploy job that depends on build, runs only on the master branch, installs netlify-cli globally, and runs netlify deploy --dir=./public.
